metadata.description: This individual appears to be a male in their 40s to 50s, with fair skin showing some fine lines around the eyes and forehead. The face is oval with a defined jawline. Hair is medium-length, straight, and styled with a side part, showing a blend of light blonde and gray, with a slightly receding hairline at the temples. The eyes are almond-shaped and set, with a striking light green color. Eyebrows are medium thickness and relatively straight. The nose has a straight bridge and a slightly rounded tip. Lips are medium thickness and well-defined. A neatly trimmed beard and mustache, predominantly gray, covers the chin and upper lip. The person has a neutral expression and faces directly forward.
metadata.anchor: light blonde and gray hair with green eyes
